title: Cook Labs Event Envelope
description: Standard envelope for all platform events. See spec 05-event-schema.md.

event_id.description: Globally unique id, assigned once at publish; consumers deduplicate on it.

tenant_id.description: Owning tenant. Events never cross tenants.

occurred_at.description: UTC time the business fact happened (not publish time).

schema_version.description: Payload shape version for this event_type.

correlation_id.description: Ties together a causal chain (request, workflow run, agent runs).

ordering_key.description: Optional per-entity ordering key where a consumer requires ordering.
